arifos.description: arifOS Constitutional Kernel — 13 tools: session_init, sense_observe, mind_reason, heart_critique, judge_deliberate, forge_execute, vault_seal, memory_recall, gateway_connect, evidence_fetch, kernel_route, reply_compose, ops_measure. All actions governed by F1-F13 floors.

geox.description: GEOX Earth Intelligence — 30 tools: seismic compute, well log QC, petrophysics, prospect evaluation, claims engine. Nobel-grade AGI Earth. EVIDENCE_ONLY — never authorizes.

wealth.description: WEALTH Capital Intelligence — 26 tools: NPV, IRR, EMV, cashflow, deal framing, zakat, market data, inequality kernel. EVIDENCE_ONLY — advisory, never decides.

well.description: WELL Human Readiness — 45 tools: vitality, sleep, fatigue, dignity, homeostasis. REFLECT_ONLY — never medical, never sole judge.

aforge.description: A-FORGE Execution Shell — build, deploy, execute approved plans. Hard-gated by arifOS judge verdict + APEX approval. Never autonomous.
